news.t: ESG And Bonds: It's A Match

overview.description: The iShares ESG Aware USD Corporate Bond ETF (SUSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of USD-denominated, investment-grade, corporate debt, selected based on positive ESG characteristics. Holdings are optimally weighted to provide a similar risk and return characteristics of the Bloomberg US Corporate Index. SUSC was launched on Jul 11, 2017 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg MSCI US Corporate ESG Focus

data.title: ESG And Bonds: It's A Match
data.text: More and more fixed income investors are incorporating ESG ratings.
